title: Movement Jump
description: Move control that causes the mob to jump as it moves with a specified delay between jumps.

max_turn.description: The maximum number of degrees the entity can turn per tick.

oneOf.description: Fixed delay, in seconds, between jumps.
Range [min, max] of the random delay between jumps, in seconds.

jump_delay.description: Delay after landing when using the slime move control.
